name: Cocomalt Macaroons
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the coconut, sweetened condensed milk, salt, vanilla extract, and cocomalt in a bowl.
2. Gently fold in the stiffly beaten egg white until well combined.
3. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto an oiled baking sheet.
4. Bake in a moderate oven (350°F) for 15 minutes.
16 servings.
